title: Squirrel Removal Long Island City Queens | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Long Island City, Queens. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving LIC. Call for fast service!
intro: Long Island City's mix of historic rowhouses, modern high-rises, and converted warehouses creates numerous entry points for squirrels seeking shelter. Our professional squirrel removal services protect LIC homes and businesses from these persistent rodents that can damage insulation, wiring, and roofing materials. We provide humane removal, complete exclusion work, and damage repair throughout the 11101, 11102, and 11109 zip codes.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Long Island City property owners for years with licensed, insured squirrel removal specialists who understand the unique challenges of Queens' most rapidly developing neighborhood. Our team responds quickly to service calls throughout LIC, from the waterfront towers to Dutch Kills residential blocks, using humane methods and guaranteed exclusion techniques.
localContext: Long Island City's blend of converted industrial lofts and new construction along the waterfront provides ideal nesting sites for squirrels in roof gaps, ventilation systems, and older masonry buildings. The area's proximity to parks like Gantry Plaza State Park and tree-lined streets in historic districts means squirrel populations remain active year-round, making professional exclusion essential for property protection.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Long Island City?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Long Island City typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. Multi-unit buildings and properties with extensive roof access points may require more comprehensive exclusion work, affecting the final price.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Long Island City property?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in attics or walls (especially at dawn and dusk), visible damage to roof soffits or vents, chewed electrical wiring, droppings in attic spaces, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your building. LIC's older buildings often show squirrel damage around cornices and roof edges.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Queens humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods in Long Island City are completely humane and comply with New York State wildlife regulations. We use live traps, one-way exclusion doors, and relocation when appropriate. Our focus is on permanent exclusion to prevent re-entry while treating animals ethically throughout the process.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to squirrel problems in Long Island City?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for squirrel emergencies in Long Island City. Given LIC's proximity to our service area and the urgent nature of squirrel intrusions (especially during nesting season), we prioritize rapid response to prevent further property damage and assess the situation quickly.
